title: copaiba elliptica
intro: Copaiba elliptica is a species of tree native to the Amazon rainforest in South America, belonging to the Copaifera genus of legume family. The resin extracted from its trunk is rich in diterpenes, specifically caryophyllene, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Copaiba elliptica resin include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function, as well as potential applications in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Copaiba elliptica is often prepared as an essential oil or resin extract, which can be used topically or internally, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
